predictions.title: ⚽ Football Predictions
predictions.not_registered: You need to create a character before placing bets.
predictions.already_started: The match has already started. You cannot place a bet.
predictions.insufficient_balance: Insufficient spirit stones. You need at least {{amount}}.
predictions.result_selected: You selected: {{prediction}}. Confirm your bet to complete.
predictions.score_selected: You selected correct score: {{score}}. Confirm your bet to complete.
predictions.bet_placed: Bet successfully placed! {{prediction}} with {{wager}} spirit stones. Potential payout: {{payout}}.
predictions.bet_edited: Prediction has been updated. Previous bet has been refunded.
predictions.void_refund: Match voided. Your bet has been refunded: {{amount}} spirit stones.
predictions.bet_won: Congratulations! You won the bet {{wager}} → received {{payout}} spirit stones.
predictions.bet_lost: Unfortunately, your bet did not win. Lost {{wager}} spirit stones.
predictions.no_active: There are no matches currently open for betting.
predictions.no_active_bets: You have no active pending bets.
predictions.no_history: You have not placed any bets.

embed.instruction: Select a result below or click an exact score button to place your wager!

config.enabled: Football predictions have been enabled for this channel.
config.disabled: Football predictions have been disabled for this channel.
config.admin_only: Only server administrators can modify prediction settings.
config.league_required: You must select a league when using the 'league' action.
config.fetch_triggered: Match data sync triggered. Please wait a few minutes for results.
